title: Pentagon UFO Files Spark Ancient Egypt Theory as New Claims Link UAP Secrets to the Pyramids
description: Newly declassified Pentagon files have reignited debates about UFOs, ancient Egypt, and Martian pyramids, suggesting possible links between ancient civilisations and unexplained phenomena.

title: 📅 Fossil Dig Day at Falls of the Ohio – May 25
Crystals inside an ancient bone in central China just overturned a 146,000-year-old story about humans
description: The assumption has been comfortable and long-standing: creativity is a product of abundance. When ancient humans had enough food, enough warmth, enough security, they had the mental space to innovate. Lean times produced lean thinking. It was a tidy, persuasive story, one that shaped how archaeologists interpreted almost every major...

title: 📅 Fossil Discovery Hike at McCormick’s Creek State Park
Durham runners win Aurora Fossil Fest 5K
